message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #808080
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #808080
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor User
participant "Web Client" as WebClient
participant "DutchPay Server" as Server
database Group

User -> WebClient : GET /
activate WebClient

WebClient -> Server : static asset 요청(HTML/CSS 등)
activate Server
Server --> WebClient : HTML/CSS 등 응답
deactivate Server

WebClient -> WebClient : 그룹 입력 페이지로 redirection
WebClient --> User : 그룹 입력 페이지

User -> WebClient : 1. 그룹 이름 입력 & 저장

WebClient -> Server : POST groups/
activate Server
Server -> Server : GUID 생성
Server -> Group : Item 생성(groupName, guid)
activate Group
Group --> Server : created
deactivate Group
Server --> WebClient : guid
deactivate Server

WebClient -> WebClient : store에 그룹 이름, guid 저장
WebClient -> WebClient : 그룹 멤버 추가 페이지로 redirection
WebClient --> User : 그룹 멤버 추가 페이지

User -> WebClient : 2. 그룹 멤버 이름 입력 & 저장

WebClient -> Server : PUT groups/{guid}/members
activate Server
Server -> Group : Item 업데이트(members)
activate Group
Group --> Server : updated
deactivate Group
Server --> WebClient : success
deactivate Server

WebClient -> WebClient : store에 그룹 멤버 이름 저장
WebClient -> WebClient : 비용 관리 페이지로 redirection
WebClient --> User : 비용 관리 페이지

loop
  User -> WebClient : 3. 비용 정보 입력 & 추가

  WebClient -> Server : PUT groups/{guid}/expenses
  activate Server
  Server -> Group : Item 업데이트(expense)
  activate Group
  Group --> Server : updated
  deactivate Group
  Server --> WebClient : success
  deactivate Server

  WebClient -> WebClient : store에 비용 정보 저장
  WebClient -> WebClient : 정산 결과 계산
  WebClient --> User : 정산 결과 노출
end

deactivate WebClient
@enduml
